stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What action should a pilot take when referring to the annexed image of an EVSI in a Resolution Advisory (RA) situation?

options.a: Descend at a rate within the green band while avoiding the red zones.
options.b: Maintain the current altitude and disregard the VSI indications.
options.c: Climb at a rate that crosses the red zones into the green band.
options.d: Descend or climb as per ATC instructions, ignoring the VSI indications.
